titleStmt.title: SII 20.193: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 193. (B.K. No. 111 of 1938-39.) GUḌIGĒRI, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 7, Īśvara, Śrāvaṇa, Amāvāsyā, Thursday, Solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1217, August 3, Thursday, f.d.t. 14. The eclipse occurred on the following day, i.e. Friday.

The inscription contains a praise of the Twelve (mahājanas) and the Fifty Families of oil-men (Telligar-Aivattokkalu) of Guḍigere and registers a gift of oil for burning a perpetual lamp to the temple of Kāḷēsvara. The gift was entrusted to Tējōnidhidēva, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
cātussamayada vṛttiyanētaṟadiṁ kādu sakaḷadharmmaṁga
ḷumaṁ prītiyiṁ naḍasutipparkhyātargguḍigeṟeya paṁnnirbba
ru vasumatiyoḷū . yellā dharmmagaḷumaṁ
telligarārayvaravaravolu mattōrvvaru ballare puṇya
manārjjisalellā nāḍoḷage Avara dharmmame dharmmaṁ .
kattaledāḍutippa śivagēhamanādaradiṁ beḷarppa lō
kōttamarayvattokkalavarillada maṁḍaḷamuṁṭe mattavaru
ttamanīyadoṁdu tithiyuṁṭe tathāmararggaṁ tapōdhana
rgguttamapātradānamane māḷpavarelliyumalte telligaru . sva
sti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷa pratāpacakra
vartti vīrasiṁhaṇadēvavarṣada 7 neya yīśvara saṁvatsarada śrā
vaṇadamāvāsye brahaspativāra sūryyagrahaṇa byatī
pātadaṁdu śrī kāḷēśvaradēvara naṁdādīvigege Alliya
sthānācāryyarappa tējōnidhidēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpū
rbbakaṁ māḍi Ayvattokkalu guḍigeṟeya śrīkā
ḷēśvaradēvarige sollage soṭige yaṇṇeyaṁ Acaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi koṭṭaru . Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya .
Digital edition of SII 20.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
